zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Orchard於1458年出生在英國戴文哈福德時，她的父親John Frederick Orchard26歲，母親Agnes Crouche26歲。她於1472年與John Prouse Lord of Bredy在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1527年4月21日在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Orchard于1458年出生在英国戴文哈福德时，她的父亲John Frederick Orchard26岁，母亲Agnes Crouche26岁。她于1472年与John Prouse Lord of Bredy在英国英格兰戴文哈福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1527年4月21日在英国英格兰戴文哈福德享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Orchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: topographic or occupational name from residence near (or perhaps employment at) an orchard, Middle English orchard (Old English ortgeard, orceard).

habitational name from any of the places called Orchard. Those in Devon and Somerset are named from Old English ortgeard, orceard (a compound of wort, wyrt ‘plant’ (later associated with Latin hortus ‘garden’) + geard ‘yard, enclosure’), while East and West Orchard near Shaftesbury in Dorset derive from Primitive Welsh ar ‘beside, in front of, facing’ + ced ‘wood’.
rare variant of Scottish   Urquhart  . Compare   Orahood  .

variants.name: Urquhart
meanings: Scottish (Ross and Cromarty): habitational name from any of various places in Scotland so called, notably the barony of Urquhart (Inverness), or places in Ross and Cromarty, Morayshire, and Fife. All are thought to derive from Pictish ar ‘on, by’ + Pictish carden ‘enclosure’ or ‘wood, copse’. Some bearers of this name trace their descent from William de Urchard, who fought for Robert the Bruce between 1297 and 1328.

variants.name: Orahood
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Orchard   3, itself a rare English variant of Scottish   Urquhart  .

History: The Orahoods can trace their origin to Alexander, Joshua, and Thomas Orahood, who in the second half of the 18th century lived in VA and are believed to come to America from Scotland. Their surname is also listed in the forms Orrahud, Arahood, Arrowhood, and Orchard, the last one being the most likely original form.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Orchard was born in 1458, in Chagford, Devon, England, her father, John Frederick Orchard, was 26 and her mother, Agnes Crouche, was 26. She married John Prouse Lord of Bredy in 1472, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 21 April 1527, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Orchard est née en 1458, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Frederick Orchard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Crouche, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Prouse Lord of Bredy en 1472, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 avril 1527, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Orchard 1458 in Chagford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Frederick Orchard 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes Crouche 26. Sie hat 1472 in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom John Prouse Lord of Bredy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. April 1527 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Orchard è nata il nel 1458 nel Chagford, Devon, England, sua padre, John Frederick Orchard, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnes Crouche, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Prouse Lord of Bredy nel 1472, nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 aprile 1527, nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Orchardが1458年にイギリスデボンチャグフォードで生まれた時，父John Frederick Orchardは26歳，母Agnes Croucheは26歳であった。1472年にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードでJohn Prouse Lord of Bredyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1527年4月21日にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Orchard(이)가 1458년 영국 데폰 차그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Frederick Orchard(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Crouche(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1472년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 John Prouse Lord of Bredy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1527년 4월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Orchard nasceu em 1458, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Frederick Orchard, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Crouche, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Prouse Lord of Bredy em 1472, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Orchard родилась в 1458 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Frederick Orchard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Crouche, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Prouse Lord of Bredy в 1472 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 апреля 1527 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Orchard nació en 1458, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Frederick Orchard, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Crouche, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Prouse Lord of Bredy en 1472, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de abril de 1527, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
